title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.310 - Driving through funeral or other procession
text:
300.310.  Driving through funeral or other procession. — No driver of a vehicle shall drive between the vehicles comprising a funeral or other authorized procession while they are in motion and when such vehicles are conspicuously designated as required in this ordinance.  This provision shall not apply at intersections where traffic is controlled by traffic control signals or police officers.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 63)
